title: Photosynthesis Lab Report
gradingNotes:
Look for proper scientific method structure.
Hypothesis should include IF/THEN format with reasoning.
Procedure should be detailed enough to replicate.
Results should reference specific data and observations.
Conclusion should: reference hypothesis, explain WHY results occurred using science concepts, identify sources of error, suggest improvements.
Must mention: light-dependent reactions, chlorophyll, chemical equation for photosynthesis.

importedDoc.text:
Photosynthesis Lab Report

[GRAIDER:QUESTION:1]
1) State your hypothesis (15 pts)

[GRAIDER:QUESTION:2]
2) Describe the procedure (20 pts)

[GRAIDER:QUESTION:3]
3) Describe your results (25 pts)

[GRAIDER:QUESTION:4]
4) Write your conclusion (25 pts)
